cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about figuring out when Andrew could have gone to the clothing store, based on the times he was seen doing other activities. Let me go through the information step by step. First, we know that Andrew woke up at 5am. Then, William saw him playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, he's at the tennis court. Then Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am. So that's 6 to 9 am at the deli. Then Tiffany saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So 9 to 11 am there. John saw him waiting at the train station from 11am to 5pm. That's a long stretch, 11am until 5pm. Then Sarah saw him reading at the library from 6pm to 9pm. Also a long time. The clothing store was closed after 9pm, so he had to go before that. Now, we need to find out when Andrew wasn't doing any of these activities, so those are the possible times he could have gone to the store. Let's map out his schedule: - 5am - 6am: Tennis - 6am - 9am: Deli - 9am - 11am: Leaning Tower of Pisa - 11am - 5pm: Train station - 6pm - 9pm: Library So what's the timeline between these activities? Starting from when he woke up at 5am. Let's check each activity's time and see if there are gaps. From 5am to 6am: tennis. Then immediately from 6am to 9am at the deli. No gap there. Then from 9am to 11am at the tower. Again, no gap between deli and tower. Then from 11am to 5pm at the train station. So after 11am until 5pm, he's there. Then from 6pm to 9pm at the library. So between 5pm and 6pm, there's a gap. Because he was at the train station until 5pm, and then the next activity starts at 6pm. So between 5pm and 6pm, he's not doing any of the listed activities. Also, after 9pm the store is closed, so he couldn't go after that. So the only possible time when he's not accounted for is 5pm to 6pm. Let me check the options. The options are: (A) 9am to 11am (but he was taking photos then) (B) 6pm to 9pm (he was at the library) (C) 11am to 5pm (he was at the train station) (D) 5pm to 6pm (this is the gap) So the correct answer should be D.
